home.hero_subtitle: We make online marketing transparent, effective and accessible. Through innovation, fair prices and intelligent use of AI, we create measurable results for your business.
home.usp_complete_desc: We offer both marketing and website development - everything in one place.
home.usp_digital_desc: Grown up in the digital world with deep understanding of online trends and youth behavior.
home.usp_nocure_desc: We believe in our results - you only pay when we deliver.
home.usp_personal_desc: You are our top priority - we listen to your needs and customize the solution.
home.process_desc: We follow a proven process that ensures transparency and results. From the first analysis to ongoing optimization - you're with us every step of the way.
home.cta_title: Ready to take the next step?
home.cta_desc: Let's talk about how we can help your business grow online.

services.hero_title: Marketing Services Denmark - SEO, Google Ads, Facebook Advertising & Web Design
services.hero_desc: We offer a complete package of digital marketing solutions at Denmark's best prices
services.meta_desc: Facebook and Instagram are still the most effective platforms to reach your target audience in Denmark. We help you create and optimize ads that actually convert.
services.meta_feature1: Targeted advertising based on interests and demographics
services.meta_feature2: A/B testing of ads for best results
services.google_desc: Be visible exactly when potential customers in Denmark search for what you offer. Google Ads is one of the most effective ways to get qualified traffic to your website.
services.seo_title: SEO Agency Denmark - Search Engine Optimization & GEO
services.seo_desc: Be visible in both traditional search engines and AI-based search systems throughout Denmark. SEO (Search Engine Optimization) and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) work together to ensure maximum online visibility for your business.
services.seo_feature2: GEO optimization for AI searches (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)
services.web_title: Web Design Agency Denmark - Professional Websites
services.web_desc: Your website is your digital business card. We build modern, fast and conversion-optimized websites for businesses throughout Denmark.
services.web_feature2: Fast load time and great user experience
services.process_subtitle: How we work together with you
services.process_step1_desc: We listen to your challenges and goals
services.process_step3_desc: We adapt to your wishes and feedback
services.process_step4_desc: We implement and deliver measurable results
services.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's talk about your opportunities

process.hero_desc: We have perfected a process that transforms your ambitions into measurable results. Transparency, collaboration and expertise in every step.
process.section_desc: Each phase is designed to maximize value and ensure the best results
process.step1_desc: We dive into your business, your goals and your target audience. Through thorough research, we identify the best opportunities for growth.
process.step2_desc: With insights from the analysis, we develop a customized strategy. You get a clear plan with defined goals and expected results.
process.step3_desc: Our creative team brings the strategy to life with visually impressive designs and engaging content that converts.
process.step4_desc: With everything in place, we launch your campaigns. From day one, we monitor performance and ensure optimal delivery.
process.step5_desc: Marketing is a continuous journey. We analyze, optimize and scale to maximize your return over time.
process.benefits_desc: Our structured approach ensures nothing is left to chance. You get full insight and control all the way.
process.benefit1_desc: You always have full insight into what we're working on and why
process.benefit2_desc: No cure, no pay - you only pay for results
process.benefit3_desc: From strategy to launch in record time
process.benefit4_desc: A permanent team that knows your business
process.cta_desc: Book a free strategy meeting and let us show you the way to growth

about.hero_title: About Nordic Marketing - Denmark's Marketing Agency
about.hero_desc: A Danish digital marketing agency focused on results and transparency
about.story_p1: Nordic Marketing is an ambitious Danish digital marketing agency based in Copenhagen. We specialize in helping businesses grow online through effective digital marketing and professional web design.
about.story_p2: Our team combines solid expertise in marketing, economics and technology. We master both the creative side of marketing and the technical implementation – from strategy to finished website and campaign.
about.story_p3: We believe that professional digital marketing should be accessible to businesses of all sizes. That's why we offer transparent prices, measurable results and personal service to every customer.
about.story_p4: With a sharp focus on the latest trends in SEO, GEO, advertising and AI technology, we ensure that our customers are always one step ahead of the competition. Your success is our mission.
about.mission_desc: To democratize digital marketing by delivering professional solutions at fair prices. We combine data-driven insights with creative execution to create measurable results for our customers.
about.vision_desc: To be the preferred marketing partner for ambitious businesses seeking growth through effective and transparent digital marketing.
about.value1_desc: Clear communication and no hidden costs. We report continuously and you always have full overview of your investment.
about.value2_desc: Everything we do is data-driven and measured on concrete KPIs. We focus on ROI and real business value.
about.value3_desc: We see ourselves as an extension of your team. Your success is our success, and we invest in every collaboration.
about.value4_desc: We constantly stay updated on the latest trends and technologies to ensure your competitive advantage.
about.cta_desc: Let's have a chat about how we can help your business

contact.hero_desc: Free consultation about SEO, Google Ads, Facebook advertising & web design - completely non-binding
contact.info_desc: Fill out the form or contact us directly. We usually respond within 24 hours.
contact.guarantee_desc: We believe in our results. You only pay when we deliver.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Briefly describe what you need help with...
